name: Shrimp Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean 1 pound of jumbo shrimp and place in a shallow pan.
2. Melt 3-6 tablespoons of margarine in a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add the garlic cloves to the melted margarine and cook until fragrant.
4. Remove from heat and stir in bread crumbs, parsley, oregano, pepper, and lemon zest.
5. Pour the mixture over the shrimp and coat evenly.
6. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
7. Place the pan in the oven and bake for 15 minutes, or until the shrimp are cooked through.
8. Serve hot over spaghetti.
